title: Crates Mod
description: This mod adds new types of blocks called crates.
body:
Decorate your worlds and expand your storage with this vanilla-friendly mod! This mod introduces crates. More types will be coming soon!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Je4fLl8yZyA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


### **Types**

Wooden Crate (Flammable, highly fragile)

Reinforced Crate (Non-flammable, blast resistant)

Emerald Crate (Non-flammable, 8 extra slots)

I am actively developing this mod every single day, so make sure to check out new features every now and then!

Curseforge page: https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/crates-mod

On Curseforge, due to naming guidelines, this mod is known as Crates Mania. It is the same mod, so do not worry.

[ALPHA TEST BUILD]
You may experience crashes and performance issues until the mod is out of testing.
